initial_candidates.sql:
WITH feb_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        s.hub_id,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS finished_orders_feb
    FROM orders o
    JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'FINISHED'
      AND o.order_created_month = 2
    GROUP BY s.hub_id
),
mar_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        s.hub_id,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS finished_orders_mar
    FROM orders o
    JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'FINISHED'
      AND o.order_created_month = 3
    GROUP BY s.hub_id
),
hub_comparison AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(f.hub_id, m.hub_id) AS hub_id,
        COALESCE(f.finished_orders_feb, 0) AS finished_orders_feb,
        COALESCE(m.finished_orders_mar, 0) AS finished_orders_mar
    FROM feb_orders f
    FULL OUTER JOIN mar_orders m ON f.hub_id = m.hub_id
)
SELECT 
    h.hub_name
FROM hub_comparison hc
JOIN hubs h ON hc.hub_id = h.hub_id
WHERE hc.finished_orders_feb > 0
  AND (hc.finished_orders_mar - hc.finished_orders_feb) * 1.0 / hc.finished_orders_feb > 0.20;

WITH feb_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        h.hub_id,
        h.hub_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS feb_orders
    FROM orders o
    JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    JOIN hubs h ON s.hub_id = h.hub_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'FINISHED'
      AND o.order_created_month = 2
      AND o.order_created_year = 2023
    GROUP BY h.hub_id, h.hub_name
),
mar_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        h.hub_id,
        h.hub_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS mar_orders
    FROM orders o
    JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    JOIN hubs h ON s.hub_id = h.hub_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'FINISHED'
      AND o.order_created_month = 3
      AND o.order_created_year = 2023
    GROUP BY h.hub_id, h.hub_name
)
SELECT 
    m.hub_name
FROM feb_orders f
JOIN mar_orders m ON f.hub_id = m.hub_id
WHERE m.mar_orders > f.feb_orders * 1.2;

WITH feb_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        h.hub_id,
        h.hub_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS feb_orders
    FROM hubs h
    JOIN stores s ON h.hub_id = s.hub_id
    JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'finished' 
      AND o.order_created_month = 2
      AND o.order_created_year = 2023
    GROUP BY h.hub_id, h.hub_name
),
mar_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        h.hub_id,
        h.hub_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS mar_orders
    FROM hubs h
    JOIN stores s ON h.hub_id = s.hub_id
    JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'finished' 
      AND o.order_created_month = 3
      AND o.order_created_year = 2023
    GROUP BY h.hub_id, h.hub_name
)
SELECT 
    m.hub_name
FROM feb_orders f
JOIN mar_orders m ON f.hub_id = m.hub_id
WHERE m.mar_orders > f.feb_orders * 1.20;

WITH feb_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        s.hub_id,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS feb_orders
    FROM orders o
    JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'FINISHED'
      AND o.order_created_month = 2
      AND o.order_created_year = 2023
    GROUP BY s.hub_id
),
mar_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        s.hub_id,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS mar_orders
    FROM orders o
    JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'FINISHED'
      AND o.order_created_month = 3
      AND o.order_created_year = 2023
    GROUP BY s.hub_id
),
growth AS (
    SELECT 
        h.hub_id,
        h.hub_name,
        COALESCE(feb.feb_orders, 0) AS feb_orders,
        COALESCE(mar.mar_orders, 0) AS mar_orders,
        CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(feb.feb_orders, 0) > 0 
            THEN (COALESCE(mar.mar_orders, 0) - COALESCE(feb.feb_orders, 0)) * 1.0 / COALESCE(feb.feb_orders, 0)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS growth_ratio
    FROM hubs h
    LEFT JOIN feb_orders feb ON h.hub_id = feb.hub_id
    LEFT JOIN mar_orders mar ON h.hub_id = mar.hub_id
)
SELECT hub_name
FROM growth
WHERE growth_ratio > 0.20;

WITH feb_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        h.hub_id,
        h.hub_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS feb_orders
    FROM hubs h
    JOIN stores s ON h.hub_id = s.hub_id
    JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'finished' 
      AND o.order_created_month = 2
    GROUP BY h.hub_id, h.hub_name
),
mar_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        h.hub_id,
        h.hub_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS mar_orders
    FROM hubs h
    JOIN stores s ON h.hub_id = s.hub_id
    JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'finished' 
      AND o.order_created_month = 3
    GROUP BY h.hub_id, h.hub_name
)
SELECT 
    m.hub_name
FROM feb_orders f
JOIN mar_orders m ON f.hub_id = m.hub_id
WHERE m.mar_orders > f.feb_orders * 1.2;

),
mar_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        h.hub_id,
        h.hub_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS mar_orders
    FROM hubs h
    JOIN stores s ON h.hub_id = s.hub_id
    JOIN orders o ON s.store_id = o.store_id
    WHERE o.order_status = 'finished' 
      AND o.order_created_month = 3
      AND o.order_created_year = 2023

WHERE m.mar_orders > f.feb_orders * 1.20;
